places.name: Taipei 101
places.address: 信義路五段, 信義區, 臺北市, 信義商圈
places.note: Iconic skyscraper with observation deck and skybar

places.name: Elephant Mountain
places.address: 臺北市, 臺灣
places.note: Short hike with panoramic views of Taipei 101 at sunset

places.name: Chiang Kai-Shek Memorial Hall
places.address: 中山南路, 中正區, 臺北市, 龍匣口
places.note: Grand national monument with hourly guard change ceremony

places.name: Liberty Square
places.address: 中正區, 臺北市, 龍匣口, 臺灣
places.note: Large plaza flanking CKS Memorial, two classical gates

places.name: National Palace Museum
places.address: 至善路二段, 士林區, 臺北市, 石角
places.note: World-class collection of Chinese imperial art and artifacts

places.name: Longshan Temple
places.address: 西園路一段, 萬華區, 臺北市, 下崁
places.note: Taipei's oldest and most atmospheric Buddhist-Taoist temple

places.name: Dadaocheng
places.address: 臺北市, 大稻埕, 臺灣
places.note: 19th century merchant district with preserved historic streetscapes

places.name: Dihua Street
places.address: 民樂街, 大同區, 臺北市, 大稻埕
places.note: Historic trading street known for teas, herbs, and dried goods

places.name: Chifeng Street
places.address: 赤峰街, 大同區, 臺北市, 建成
places.note: Trendy alley lined with independent cafes, vintage shops, and boutiques

places.name: Raohe Street Night Market
places.note: Popular, food-focused night market with covered arcade

places.name: Shilin Night Market
places.address: 基河路, 士林區, 臺北市, 臺灣
places.note: Taipei's largest and most famous night market

places.name: Ningxia Night Market
places.address: 重慶北路二段73巷, 大同區, 臺北市, 建成
places.note: Smaller, more local night market known for traditional Taiwanese snacks

places.name: Shida Night Market
places.address: 溫州街16巷, 大安區, 臺北市, 古亭
places.note: Student-area market near National Taiwan Normal University

places.name: Huaxi Street Night Market
places.note: Old-school market in Wanhua, known for snake and exotic foods

places.name: Nanmen Market
places.address: 愛國東路, 大安區, 臺北市, 龍匣口
places.note: Daytime traditional market popular with locals for fresh produce and delicacies

places.name: Shuanglian Market
places.address: 民生西路, 大同區, 臺北市, 建成
places.note: Low-key morning market near Shuanglian MRT

places.name: Beitou Hot Springs
places.address: 中山路, 北投區, 臺北市, 新北投
places.note: Geothermal spring district 30 min from central Taipei by MRT

places.name: Wulai Hot Springs
places.note: Indigenous Atayal village and hot spring resort ~1hr south of Taipei

places.name: Da'an Park
places.address: 大安區, 臺北市, 東區商圈, 臺灣
places.note: Central city park popular for jogging, outdoor dance classes, and picnics

places.name: Ximending
places.address: 峨眉街, 萬華區, 臺北市, 臺灣
places.note: Pedestrian shopping and youth culture district in Wanhua

places.name: Treasure Hill Artist Village
places.note: Preserved 1940s veterans' settlement turned artist colony with studios and galleries

places.name: Songshan Ciyou Temple
places.address: 八德路四段, 松山區, 臺北市, 潭美
places.note: Ornate Taoist temple at the entrance of Raohe Night Market

places.name: Qingtian Street
places.address: 青田街, 大安區, 臺北市, 古亭
places.note: Tree-lined street of Japanese colonial-era wooden houses in Da'an District

places.name: Maokong Gondola
places.address: 指南路三段32巷, 文山區, 臺北市, 臺灣
places.note: Aerial gondola to hillside tea plantations with city views

places.name: Zhinan Temple
places.address: 萬壽路, 文山區, 臺北市, 臺灣
places.note: Hilltop Taoist temple accessible via Maokong Gondola, great views

places.name: Shiding Thousand Island Lake
places.note: Emerald reservoir lakes in the hills east of Taipei, best viewed from above
